typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]
typography.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Tetris Mode for Marketing) mixed with strict Swiss grid. Use 1px borders (border-border) to define structural sections. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8 or p-12).

components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none). High contrast hover states. Primary: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent/90. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-foreground text-foreground hover:bg-foreground hover:text-white.
components.cards: Flat, 1px border-border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight translate-y-1, crisp shadow. Keep internal padding generous (p-8 to p-12).
components.inputs: Square edges (rounded-none), border-border, focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-accent focus-visible:border-accent. High contrast placeholder.
components.accordion: Shadcn Accordion. Use plus/minus icons instead of chevrons if possible, or standard chevrons. border-b border-border.

hero.layout: Grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12. Left column (col-span-7) for massive typography and waitlist form. Right column (col-span-5) for an abstract geometric visual or tech dashboard mockup.
hero.features: Include the pulsing waitlist counter below the form (e.g., '● 1,492 sales leaders joined').
hero.design_notes: Use the hero_graphic media URL as a prominent visual in the right column, either contained in a sharp box or edge-to-edge.

how_it_works.layout: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode). 3-4 distinct cards explaining automated prospecting, meeting booking, AI replacement of SDRs.
how_it_works.style: Use mono font numbers (01, 02, 03) in the corners. Stark contrast.

pricing_comparison.layout: Two-column grid layout. Left: Traditional Agency (Gray background, strikethrough text). Right: Citius AI-Native (White background, Accent blue borders, highlighting 65-75% gross margins).
pricing_comparison.style: Visual table or side-by-side cards. Extremely clear value proposition.

testimonials.layout: Grid of 3 cards. Stark, border-collapse style layout where borders merge.

faq.layout: Narrow central column (max-w-3xl) to maintain readable line length.
faq.style: Minimalist typography, clear spacing between items.

final_cta.layout: Massive padding (py-32). Centralized or aggressively left-aligned.
final_cta.style: Dark background (bg-primary text-primary-foreground) or Accent background (bg-accent text-white) to invert the page and create a final impact.

headshots.description: Confident African woman in black suit

abstract_backgrounds.description: Abstract blue geometric pattern with layered triangles
Abstract pattern of black shapes on a light blue background

animation.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use framer-motion.
animation.hover: Subtle background color shifts, strict 1px border color transitions. No bouncy scaling.

icons.style: Sharp, minimal, consistent stroke width (1.5px or 2px max).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout of the marketing page sections.
Use Shadcn UI for interactive elements like the Waitlist form (Input, Button) and FAQ (Accordion).
Import Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
The waitlist counter MUST have a pulsing green or blue dot (using Tailwind's animate-pulse on a rounded-full div) next to the text.
Apply Tailwind's 'grayscale' class to the testimonial headshot images to ensure they match the strict Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
The Pricing Comparison section must prominently highlight the margin difference (25-30% Traditional vs 65-75% Citius AI) using massive typography (e.g., text-6xl for the numbers).
Add `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, form inputs, accordion triggers, and key informational elements (like the waitlist counter).
